meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.21 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] #331 dotted-letter composition, dot below. The reclaimed run Sas has an uppercase S (word-initial, no dotted glyph) and a lowercase s; a bare selector takes the first *composable* occurrence, so the lowercase s becomes ṣ (U+1E63) and the capital S is left untouched. Reclaimed origin.
